name: agentTest1
title: Agent Test 1
description: Receives START_AGENT_TEST1, asks the LLM the prompt-test1 question, emits AGENT_TEST1_DONE with the LLM response as payload.

actions.name: callAgentTest1
actions.description: Send the prompt-test1.md body to the LLM and capture the answer.

name: agentTest2
title: Agent Test 2
description: Receives AGENT_TEST1_DONE, parses the LLM response from the payload, and appends a line to workflow-test1.log.

tool_use.name: writeWorkflowLog
tool_use.description: Append the AGENT_TEST1_DONE payload to the per-tenant workflow log file.

actions.name: writeWorkflowLog
actions.description: Append the AGENT_TEST1_DONE payload (the LLM response) to data/logs/<tenant>/workflow-test1.log.
